diagrams.title: Exec Function Variants
diagrams.description: Shows the six exec function variants and their differences based on suffixes
diagrams.purpose: Remember the differences between all exec functions using suffix meanings

diagrams.title: Pipe Communication Flow
diagrams.description: Demonstrates unidirectional pipe between parent and child process
diagrams.purpose: Understand how data flows through pipe in one direction only

diagrams.title: IPC Methods Classification
diagrams.description: Categorizes IPC methods into Communication and Synchronization types
diagrams.purpose: Visual overview of all IPC methods and their categories

diagrams.title: Shared Memory with Semaphore
diagrams.description: Shows how semaphore protects shared memory access between processes
diagrams.purpose: Understand how semaphores synchronize access to shared memory

visuals.title: Exec Functions Overview Of Ipc Methods
visuals.description: Visual diagram for exec functions overview of ipc methods
